ccel.title: NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome

source.title: NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome
NPNF2-06. Jerome: The Principal Works of St. Jerome

verses.text: This letter is extant also among those of Procopius of Gaza, to whose works it properly belongs.
As this Procopius flourished a century later than Jerome, the letter cannot be addressed to him.
